class.name: B4R::B4RNimBLEClient

method.name: Initialize
Connect
method.comment: @brief Starts the connection process and service discovery. @return true if successfully connected and characteristics found.

method.name: Disconnect
method.comment: @brief Terminates an existing connection and cleans up resources.

method.name: Write
IsConnected
method.comment: @brief Checks if the client is currently connected. @return true if connected.
